mapper.sql: SELECT id, review_id, image_url, sort_order, create_time FROM booking_review_image
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking_review_image (review_id, image_url, sort_order, create_time) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder}, sysdate())

INSERT INTO booking_review_image (review_id, image_url, sort_order, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.reviewId}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.sortOrder}, sysdate())
mapper.select: WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
